untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis indicators (quarterly EPS growth, prior year EPS comparison, 5-year earnings CAGR, annual YoY earnings changes) which are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. The rule depends on earnings data that cannot be derived from price/volume/technical indicators alone. A partial translation using returns as a proxy for earnings growth has been provided, but this does not capture the nuanced multi-year earnings consistency pattern required by the original signal.
translation_notes: Original signal is fundamentals-based (earnings analysis), not technical-based. The entry_long condition uses returns >= 0.20 (20%) as a weak proxy for the quarterly EPS growth requirement, but this misses the critical components: (1) prior-year quarter comparison, (2) 5-year CAGR >= 15%, (3) annual YoY consistency checks. Recommend implementing this signal using a fundamental data feed with EPS fields rather than a pure technical backtest engine.
